summary: Interactive Drill-Down Analytics Testing Complete - ALL CORE FEATURES WORKING. Backend: 12/13 tests passed (1 skipped due to empty CS pipeline). Frontend: All drill-down modals verified working - Sales Leaderboard, CS Leaderboard with Nasida VN showing 153 students, Mentor Bifurcation with Ashwin Sudarsh showing 224 students. Finance Settings: INR currency available in both Payment Gateways and Bank Accounts dropdowns.

minor.issue: Skipped - CS pipeline returns empty data when no students in pipeline stages

passed_tests: Backend: /api/dashboard/drill/agent-students?agent_name=X - returns enrolled leads for agent by name
Backend: /api/dashboard/drill/team-agents?team_name=X - returns agents with deals and revenue
Backend: /api/dashboard/drill/pipeline-stage?stage=X - returns stage, total, agent_breakdown, leads
Backend: /api/cs/drill/agent-students?agent_name=X - returns CS agent's students with upgrade details

Frontend: Mentor Dashboard row click opens drill-down modal (Ashwin Sudarsh: 224 students)

Frontend: Finance Settings > Payment Gateways > Currency dropdown has INR option

All drill-down API endpoints use agent_name/mentor_name parameters (not IDs) as required by frontend charts
